candidates.why: Single standalone operating D&A line above EBIT, but nothing indicates it is specifically tied to COGS or a subcomponent of 'Materials and purchased services'. To avoid misallocating a company-level operating D&A line to COGS, do not add it to the selected COGS bucket.

variables.notes: Selected COGS bucket is only 'Materials and purchased services'. The standalone D&A row is not clearly labelled as COGS-related, so it should not be separately added to COGS.

candidates.why: Standalone operating D&A line above EBIT at the same level as the selected overhead rows 'Other external expenses' and 'Personnel costs'. Since the selected XSGA_COMPONENTS explicitly excluded depreciation/amortisation and there is no separate R&D expense row, this row should be added separately to the XSGA bucket.

variables.notes: Use the standalone operating D&A summary row once for XSGA_DA. Do not add to COGS_DA as well, to avoid double counting.
